I swore I'd never come back

Last week I did, for the first time in nearly 12 years

Why? Because @nayibbukele has changed this country at breakneck speed and I wanted to se

social.name: Israeli PM Office
social.text:
R to @IsraeliPM: Thank you to our heroic fighters, to the intelligence personnel, and to our Air Force. You are the best in the world.

I salute you; the People of Israel salute you!

social.name: Israeli PM Office
social.text: R to @IsraeliPM: I say to our enemies in the clearest possible way: No terrorist has immunity. Anyone who threatens the State of Israel will pay the price.

social.name: Israeli PM Office
social.text:
R to @IsraeliPM: In the past month, we have eliminated more than 200 Hezbollah terrorists who acted against Israeli citizens and IDF soldiers.

We are doing the same in Gaza, eliminating terror cells, including yesterday.

social.name: Emmanuel Macron
social.text:
Je viens de m’entretenir avec le Président iranien Massoud Pezeshkian.

J’ai marqué ma vive préoccupation sur l'escalade en cours, et condamné les frappes injustifiées contre les infrastructures civiles émiriennes et plusieurs navires.

Toutes les parties doivent lever le blocus

social.name: Donald Trump
social.text: Pinned: Video

social.name: Donald Trump
social.text:
RT by @realDonaldTrump: On behalf of Erin and me, thank you to everyone for the love and support we've received. We both had an unforgettable wedding day, and we'll never forget it. We're humbled and grateful to all.

THANK YOU! 🙏🏻🇺🇸🦅🚀
